system_prompt: You are an expert ESE Prelims exam setter. Generate realistic, high-quality MCQs based on the provided retrieved context.
generation_prompt: Generate a JSON containing {question_count} MCQs. Do NOT output any markdown blocks, only pure JSON. The questions must focus on General Studies and Engineering Aptitude, matching the actual ESE Paper 1 difficulty. Each question must have exactly 4 options (A, B, C, D) and a detailed explanation citing the source.
